result.stdout:
Softband Extractor CLI - Extract database schema metadata as JSON

Usage:
  softband-extractor [provider] [connection-string] [output-file (optional)]

Examples:
  softband-extractor postgresql "Host=localhost;Username=admin;Password=pass;Database=mydb" metadata.json
  softband-extractor mssql "Server=.;Database=mydb;User Id=sa;Password=pass" output.json

Note:
  If [output-file] is omitted, the result will be saved as 'metadata.json' in the current directory.

Supported Providers:
  postgresql, mssql, mysql, oracle, db2

Options:
  --help          Show this help message
  --version       Display the tool version

Troubleshooting:
  If installation fails or tool is already installed, try:
    dotnet tool uninstall --global Softband.Extractor.Cli
    dotnet tool install --global Softband.Extractor.Cli
